title: Why Polished AI Outputs Still Need Careful Review
titleCandidates: Why Polished AI Outputs Still Need Careful Review
Turn Every Polished AI Draft Into a Reliable Result
How to Review AI Outputs Before You Use Them
description:
A polished AI result can look finished before its assumptions, evidence, and failure modes have been checked. This AI output review method turns the first draft into an inspectable decision with a reusable five-pass checklist.

What you'll learn:
- Recognize when polish is suppressing critical evaluation
- Use focused follow-ups and collaboration rules to expose gaps
- Review Goal, Gaps, Grounds, Test, and Owner before release

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
01:16 The Polish Trap
03:08 Iteration
04:56 Set the Terms
06:28 Inspect the Work
08:21 Review Loop
09:55 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
